submit.title: Start with the basics.
submit.lede: Company, role, level, and outcome. You’ll add rounds and questions next. Nothing is published until you finish and it clears review.

role.label: Role
role.empty: No matching role — pick the closest canonical title.

level.label: Level (optional)
level.chooseRole: Add a role first to pick a level.

attribution.note: Anonymous is the default — and posting anonymously still credits your karma. Karma is account-bound, never tied to your public name, so an anonymous report stays anonymous everywhere while you still earn for it. You can verify a work email later without revealing who you are.

errors.company: Pick a company or suggest a new one.

drafts.title: Pick up where you left off.
drafts.lede: This draft is saved to your account. Changes keep auto-saving as you edit.

rounds.title: Walk through your rounds.
rounds.lede: Add a card for each round you went through — its type, how it felt, and the questions you were asked. No rounds? You can submit just the basics.
rounds.empty: No rounds yet. Add the first one to start capturing questions.
rounds.capReached: You’ve reached the max of {max} rounds.

errors.roundType: Choose a round type before submitting.

submit.blocked: Finish the highlighted rounds and questions before submitting.

questions.heading: Questions
questions.label: Question {n}
questions.capReached: Max of {max} questions per round reached.
questions.empty: No questions logged for this round yet.

errors.tags: Add at least one topic (pending suggestions don’t count yet).

tags.label: Topics
tags.hint: Tag at least one topic per question.

detail.noQuestions: No questions logged for this round.

status.pending_moderation: In review — visible only to you until it clears moderation.

edit.window: You can edit this experience for {hours, plural, =1 {1 more hour} other {# more hours}}.
edit.locked: The 24-hour edit window has closed, so this experience can no longer be changed.

delete.confirm: Delete this experience? It will be hidden immediately, and after 90 days the free text you wrote is permanently scrubbed. This can't be undone.
delete.done: This experience has been deleted and is no longer visible. Its free text is scheduled to be permanently scrubbed after 90 days.

helpful.heading: Was this helpful?
helpful.count: {count, plural, =0 {No one has marked this helpful yet} =1 {1 person found this helpful} other {# people found this helpful}}
helpful.signInHint: Sign in to mark reports helpful.
helpful.verifyHint: Verify your account to mark reports helpful.
helpful.authorHint: You can't mark your own report helpful — but you earn karma when others do.
helpful.rateLimited: You've reached today's limit for helpful marks. Try again tomorrow.
helpful.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
